criteria.title: All MCP tools return stable, documented response shapes.
criteria.details: Shared response normalizers exist and MCP tool regression coverage asserts canonical response fields.

criteria.title: Installed-runtime release sweep passes with no empty evidence for known-good retrieval checks.
Default cache path behavior is understood and either fixed or clearly documented.
criteria.details: README and install docs explain fallback behavior and the supported remediation path.

criteria.title: `update_self` has dedicated test coverage or an approved explicit exclusion policy.
criteria.details: Dedicated update-service tests cover dry-run validation and real failure paths.

criteria.title: Supported client auto-install paths are verified on real configs.
criteria.details: 2/6 supported real configs currently include LocalNest

criteria.title: Release report generation is repeatable and trustworthy enough to gate a publish decision.
criteria.details: Release JSON report missing or malformed at /mnt/da2ae3dd-9788-4b37-88e8-effd7025eb4c/Base Projects/localnest/reports/localnest-0-0-4-beta-6-release-test-report.json
